steps.title: Identify the Parallel Structure
steps.content: The key signal is the “not only [blank] but also illuminate” structure. Illuminate means to shed light on or clarify, so the blank should have a parallel meaning: to recognize, perceive, or understand.

steps.title: Match to the Correct Choice
steps.content:
Discern means to perceive or recognize clearly, which parallels the action of illuminate (shed light on, clarify) in revealing understanding.

The other three don't fit: they describe actions unrelated to understanding evolution.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
